concepts.title: Čech cocycles and cohomology
concepts.blurb: Cover-based cocycles detect obstruction classes for global patching.

concepts.title: Derived functor sheaf cohomology
concepts.blurb: Right derived functors of global sections define H^i(X,F) abstractly.

concepts.title: Picard groups and Serre duality signals
concepts.blurb: Line bundles, extensions, and duality theorems are naturally cohomological.
